name: Boston Chicken & KFC Rotisserie Whole Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill the cavity of the whole chicken with apple, onion, and celery pieces.
2. Place the chicken in a Pam-sprayed Dutch oven or roasting pan that is deep enough to seal later without touching the skin.
3. Follow the Boston Chicken & KFC Rotisserie recipe for cooking chicken breasts.
4. Use an oven temperature of 350°F (175°C) and cook for an hour plus 15 to 30 minutes, depending on the size of the chicken.
5. Ensure the chicken is nicely browned before serving. Alternatively, use Reynolds Oven Bags following the provided instructions.
